overview: Annamacharya Institute of Technology and Sciences, Tirupati (AITS-T), officially states that it was established in 2007 and operates from a campus of more than 45 acres at Venkatapuram, Renigunta, near Tirupati. The institute says it was founded under the Annamacharya Educational Trust and is designed as a quality-focused engineering campus at the foot of the Seven Hills.
accreditation: Autonomous; AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUA; NBA accreditation for 5 eligible UG engineering programs; NAAC A Grade; Institution of Engineers (India) accreditation; recognized under UGC 2(f) and 12(B).

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - AI and Data Science, AI and Machine Learning, Computer Science (IoT and Cyber Security), Computer Science and Information Technology, Civil, CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical and related specializations offered through AP EAPCET counseling

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Published public sources place the total fee around Rs. 1.00 lakh
Published public sources place MBA and MCA around Rs. 60,000 total

admissions.admissionProcess: The official site publishes admissions and academic curriculum links under EAMCET, ICET, PGECET, and ECET code AITT, and the institute participates in the relevant Andhra Pradesh counseling processes for UG and PG programs.
admissions.importantDates: The official site carries admissions and academic updates, while AP EAPCET, ECET, ICET, and PGECET schedules are announced by the respective state authorities each cycle.

campus.specialNote: The institute emphasizes its location near Tirupati and its identity as a campus built around the legacy of saint-poet Annamacharya and the educational mission of the trust.

contact.address: Venkatapuram (Village), Renigunta (Mandal), Tirupati, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh - 517520, India
